corpus.dropHint: Drop TXT / MD / PDF / DOCX files
corpus.author: Author

preprocess.title: Preprocess
preprocess.annotationWarning: {{count}} annotation(s) exist on the target documents. Changing text may require reviewing existing character offsets.

quant.pythonFallback: Showing browser-side counts because Python is not connected
quant.noDispersionData: Add documents and search terms to show the dispersion plot

nlp.title: NLP Analysis
nlp.pythonRequired: Runs through the Python sidecar in Tauri

about.title: About BKI
about.creditsNote: BKI uses the following open-source libraries, models, and datasets. Please cite them appropriately in academic work.

process.title: Process Log
process.subtitle: Shows internal steps, sidecar calls, and fallback behavior.

import.title: 1. Add Documents
import.body: Drop TXT, Markdown, PDF, or DOCX files into the corpus pane. Added documents become the active local corpus in memory.
import.note: PDF and DOCX text extraction runs through the Python sidecar. In browser-only mode, TXT, Markdown, CSV, and TSV files can still be imported.

metadata.title: 2. Review Metadata
metadata.body: Use the edit icon on a document row to enter date, author, category, tags, and language. Timeline and category analysis rely on these fields.
metadata.note: Use YYYY-MM-DD dates for stable monthly and yearly grouping.

preprocess.title: 3. Check Preprocessing
preprocess.body: The preprocess tab collects settings such as normalization, lowercasing, punctuation cleanup, stopword removal, and stemming.
preprocess.note: Running preprocessing updates the target document text and records the result in the process log and preview.

qda.title: 4. Code Qualitatively
qda.body: Create codes and attach annotations to character ranges. The data model supports multiple codes on one annotation.
qda.note: Start with a small set of broad codes, then refine them into a hierarchy later.

quant.title: 5. Run Quantitative and NLP Analysis
quant.body: Use keyword frequency for grouped term counts. The NLP panel can run NER, topic modeling, similarity, POS, dependency, and lexical statistics.
quant.note: When Python models are unavailable, BKI returns the best available fallback results.

export.title: 6. Export and Inspect Processing
export.body: Export .bki projects and CSV summaries from the export tab. Use the process log button to inspect what happened internally.
export.note: BKI is local-first. The process log records summaries needed for traceability, not full document text.

corpus.title: Corpus Management
corpus.body: Add, select, filter, and edit metadata in the left pane. When documents are selected, analysis uses that selection.
corpus.action: Start with two or three small text files, then add dates and categories.

preprocess.title: Preprocessing
preprocess.body: Run normalization, lowercasing, punctuation cleanup, stopword removal, and stemming before analysis.
preprocess.action: For mixed-language corpora, check each document's language metadata first.

qda.title: Qualitative Analysis
qda.body: Create codes, annotate ranges, and record memos for interpretive decisions.
qda.action: Begin with three to five broad categories, then refine them later.

quant.title: Keyword Frequency
quant.body: Group search terms and count them by month, year, document, or category. Results appear as a line chart.
quant.action: Put spelling variants and synonyms in one group to track concepts rather than individual spellings.

nlp.title: NLP Analysis
nlp.body: Run NER, topic modeling, similarity, POS, dependency, and lexical statistics through the Python sidecar.
nlp.action: Check the process log for fallback status when language models are not installed.

process.title: Process Log
process.body: Inspect starts, sidecar calls, completions, errors, and fallback behavior in chronological order.
process.action: When results look surprising, first check the target document count and settings.

export.title: Export
export.body: Save the full project as .bki and export frequency tables as CSV. You can also manage the Stellar export path.
export.action: Export a .bki file at research milestones to preserve reproducibility.
